---
title: "DABEST 2.0: estimation statistics"
---

[← Back to research](../../research.qmd){.back-link}

[co-author · in revision, Nature Methods]{.paper-meta}

DABEST (Data Analysis with Bootstrap-coupled ESTimation) is an open-source toolbox for
*estimation statistics*: it reports effect sizes with bootstrap confidence intervals and
plots every datapoint, rather than reducing an experiment to a p-value.

For the 2.0 release I contributed to the package by validating the new proportion-plots
feature and running real-data testing to make sure the graphics and statistics held up on
messy experimental data.

To learn more: [the DABEST package →](https://acclab.github.io/DABEST-python/)

[]{.section-rule}
